title: At the Airport: Travel Essentials
subtitle: Handle check-in, security, and boarding with confidence
fit:
<!-- SCENARIO FIT — Aula 10
Can-do: "I can handle airport situations: check-in, security and boarding."
Gramatica-alvo: modal verbs (must, have to, should, can/can't) para regras/conselho/permissao + travel vocab.
Vocab-alvo: boarding pass, gate, check-in, luggage, departure, customs, aisle seat, delay.
Cenario escolhido: Rafael no aeroporto, indo para os EUA em viagem de negocios (foco Travel do aluno; ordem do curriculo coloca aeroporto na aula 10).
Por que elicita o alvo: o aeroporto OBRIGA modais de regra/permissao e o vocab de viagem. Aderencia >= 90%.
-->
<!-- CONTINUIDADE — Aula 10
Itens novos: boarding pass, gate, check-in, luggage, departure, customs, aisle seat, delay; modal verbs (must/have to/should/can).
Itens revisados (1-9): leitura de numeros e horarios (L9: gate 22, departure 3:40), 'I travel to the US' (L1), Could (pedido educado, L4).
Callback no warm-up: slide 2 retoma a Aula 9 (numeros/horarios — ler gate e horario de voo) e o fato 'I travel to the US once a year' (L1).
-->
